top_signals.title: Airtel Mobile-Money Unit Chooses London for Listing Location
top_signals.summary: Airtel Africa Plc picked London as the primary listing location for its mobile-money business and expects to start trading there this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lewis Hamilton hoping to head into F1’s August break on high note
top_signals.summary: Ferrari boss Fred Vasseur was wary ⁠of talking up the team's prospects, even if others were already doing so.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hackers steal $31.6M in 2 crypto bridge attacks within 7 hours
top_signals.summary: AFX, a decentralized perpetual exchange operating on Arbitrum, reportedly lost $24.15 million on Wednesday, while the Verus Ethereum bridge was attacked hours later.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Modi vows ‘swift’ justice for India exam leaks
top_signals.summary: Prime minister makes first comments on scandal that triggered protests in Delhi this week
